title: Sheol's Refinement
description: Engaging and enjoyable hardcore game for you and your friends.
body: ![additive](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/additive_vector.svg) Sheol's Refinement is designed to enhance your Minecraft Hardcore experience by introducing a carefully selected set of mods that add new features, improve gameplay mechanics, and provide additional content while maintaining the core essence of the vanilla Minecraft experience. But basically a personal modpack for me and my friends. Credits: 1. This modpack contains content not made by me, as such all rights are reserved to their rightful owners, creators, and maintainers. 2. This modpack is a modification/variation of Additive by Devin with changes and additions that I personally enjoy.
